## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-1106 — Minimum speed in left lane

(1) Where the average grade is six percent or more uphill for at least one mile, no person shall operate a motor vehicle in the far left lane of traffic of interstate 70 at a speed of less than the lower of ten miles per hour below the speed limit or the minimum speed set by the department of transportation, except if:

    (a) Necessary to obey traffic control devices;

    (b) Necessary to exit or enter interstate 70;

    (c) Weather or traffic conditions require speeds slower than the speed limit necessary under section 42-4-1101 ; or

    (d) Necessary because of a lane closure or blockage.

(2) The department of transportation shall post signs giving the public notice of this section.

The department of transportation shall post signs giving the public notice of this section.
